column.text:
• Kansas City Royals transferred 2B Jonathan India to the 60-day injured list with a left shoulder subluxation.
• Atlanta Braves designated C Chadwick Tromp for assignment.
• Baltimore Orioles designated RHP Eduarniel Núñez for assignment.
• Toronto Blue Jays designated RHP Tanner Andrews for assignment.
• Houston Astros signed free agent 1B LaMonte Wade Jr.
• Texas Rangers activated SS Corey Seager from the 10-day injured list.
• Houston Astros activated LF Joey Loperfido from the 10-day injured list.
• Toronto Blue Jays activated RHP Chad Dallas.
• Cleveland Guardians sent SS Gabriel Arias on a rehab assignment to Triple-A Columbus.
• Arizona Diamondbacks sent LF Jordan Lawlar on a rehab assignment to Triple-A Reno.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
